disambiguated.context: At the bar, two different individuals approached a man sitting alone at the bar - they were named Grace Nguyen and Jose Rojas. Grace Nguyen passed by him and ordered a drink from the bartender while Jose Rojas told the man the rate for the two of them spending the night together.
disambiguated.question: Who was just going up to the bartender?
